Modern Frame Design with Wireless One Connect

With a sleek, minimalist design, The Frame Pro is a masterpiece in itself. With the Wireless One Connect Box, you can wirelessly connect to other devices, enabling you to adjust your setup & stay cable clutter free.*
* TV requires a separate power cable connection. Operating distance can vary depending on the surrounding environment. Wireless One Connect may not work well if there is an obstruction, such as a wall, hindering its connection to the TV within your home. Wireless One Connect box may not work properly if placed inside a closed metal cabinet.

Wireless One Connect

The Wireless One Connect Box delivers a streamlined, clutter‑free setup. Designed to deliver a clutter‑free setup with an operational range up to 10m, so your space can stay clean and focused on the viewing experience.
TV requires a separate power cable connection.Operating distance can vary depending on the surrounding environment.
Wireless One Connect box may not work properly if placed inside a closed metal cabinet.

Height-adjustable Stand

Set The Frame to your preferred height with the Height Adjustable Stand. You can raise it up to make room for a soundbar and other devices.*
* Soundbar sold separately. The product may differ from image depending on the Soundbar model. The height adjustment range is 25 mm. Detailed dimensions can be found in the specifications. (Set Size with Stand, Set Size without Stand.)

Art Home

Expand your creative palate with ease and convenience. Explore expert art curations, regularly updated so you can constantly discover more. Art Home is more than just a gallery, it's your personal gateway to a world of creativity and inspiration.*
* Art Home UI may vary by region and is subject to change without notice.
* Though the curations are updated regularly, the updates for the selection of available artwork may vary.
* Studio Stand sold separately.

Picture Quality

How does The Frame's picture quality elevate the art it displays?For art almost as real as the canvas with Neo QLED, enhanced by Certified Glare Free.

Glare Free with Neo QLED

Frame Pro delivers exceptional picture quality with lifelike colour with PANTONE Validated® certification. Powered by our most advanced Glare Free technology*, it is designed to reduce reflections while minimising visual discomfort, even in bright indoor lighting. Combined with Neo QLED, it helps ensure stunning clarity and gallery-like art quality, so virtually every image looks focused, immersive, and beautifully true to life.**
* The LS03HW meets the requirements of PANTONE® Validated: Certificate dated 20/02/2026. Picture quality may vary depending on quality and resolution of source content and viewing conditions. Screen image simulated for illustrative purposes.
* The LS03HW has been independently verified as Glare Free: Reflection Glare UGR <10, Discomfort Glare UGR <22, Disability Glare UGR <34 by UL LLC. (UL Solutions), Certificate Number: V166045 - Exp. 31/12/2026.

Samsung Vision AI Companion

Samsung Vision AI Companion acts as a private guide for The Frame, helping you quickly find artworks that match your personal taste. By understanding on-screen context and style preferences, it curates art and inspiration with ease - making discovery faster, simpler and uniquely yours.

Game Bar

Easily take control and quickly access and navigate settings that can take your game to the next level from the Game Bar.*

AdditionalAttributes.description:
• Vivid Colour Technology: Experience lifelike images with vibrant and true-to-life colours.
  • World of Entertainment: Google TV provides a one-stop solution to all your entertainment needs. Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, Prime Video, Stan, Hulu, Fox Sports, and many more!
  • Smooth Fast-Action Playback: Motionflow XR ensures sharp and blur-free fast action scenes.
  • 4K Clarity Enhancement: Enjoy 2K and HD content upscaled to near-4K quality with 4K X-Reality PRO.
  • Voice Control and Smart Integration: Use Google, Alexa, or Siri for seamless control and a smarter home.

Every Image, Alive with Vivid Colours

Live Colour expands colours of images to the reproducible colours of the TV so everything you see looks vivid and real.

Even Fast Action Looks Smooth and Sharp

Motionflow XR creates and inserts extra frames between the originals. With more images seen every second, action is smoother and sharper.

What You Want to Watch, All in One Place

Browse 700,000+ movies and TV episodes from across your streaming services, all in one place and organised into topics and genres based on what interests you.

Chromecast Built-In

Easily cast movies, shows, photos, and more from your phone to your TV.

Compatible with Apple AirPlay

Stream effortlessly to your TV from your iPhone, iPad or Mac. Watch movies from apps or Safari. Share photos with friends in the room.

Use Your Voice to Control Your TV With Help From Google

Your TV is more helpful than ever. Ask Google to find movies, stream apps, play music, and control the TV - all with your voice. Even get answers, control smart home devices, and more. Just say "Ok Google" to get started.

A Clear Picture, Whatever You Watch

Images filmed in 2K and even HD are upscaled close to 4K. Our 4K X-Reality PRO uses a unique 4K database to sharpen and refine pictures in real time, revealing extra details.

Ask Siri to Control Your TV with Just Your Voice

With Apple Home, you can easily and securely control the Sony TV with the Home app and Siri on your Apple device, using HomeKit technology. Set up your TV in a few simple steps and control with a tap or by asking Siri.

Connect with Your Alexa

Connect your Alexa enabled devices for seamless hands-free control of BRAVIA. With Alexa, you can power up your TV, change channels, control volume and more.

A Beautifully Entertaining Design

With a narrow bezel, this TV looks luxurious and refined. Keeps you focused on the picture, not what's around it.

Sound With Great Bass

X-Balanced Speaker was created to fit the TV's slim design while powering movies and music with clear sound.

Paired. Streamed. Shared.

Effortlessly stream movies and music videos and share photos with your friends from your Apple devices on your BRAVIA.

Auto HDR Tone Mapping

Auto HDR Tone Mapping instantly optimises HDR settings during your PS5 initial setup. Even in dark shadow and bright highlights, you'll see fine details and true colours.

Auto Genre Picture Mode

BRAVIA automatically switches into Game mode with PS5 to minimise lag and maximise responsiveness. It switches back to Standard Mode when watching movies for more expressive scenes.

Most of our products are supported by a 12 month warranty. This warranty covers all manufacturer faults with the product. Change of Mind Returns Policy
30 Days, Buyer pays for return postage.

If the outcome of this assessment is not agreed upon by the customer within 30 days of being received by us, the product will be considered abandoned, and we will dispose of it.
 
Refunds Under Australian Consumer Law
Our goods come with guarantees that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law. You are entitled to a replacement or refund for a major failure and compensation for any other reasonably foreseeable loss or damage. You are also entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced if the goods fail to be of acceptable quality and the failure does not amount to a major failure.
